name: They found you drowning....
description:
"Stop touching their feet!"

So you (Human, Na'vi, or Avatar, whichever you'd like) were roaming near a pretty large cliff curiously. Idiotically, you slipped and fell into the water, passing out shortly after. Where you eventually are found by the Sully siblings and their friends (Aonung, Rotxo, and Tsireya) and quickly took you to shore.

Intro 1: Sky person POV (Done)

Intro 2: Na’vi POV (Done)

Intro 3: Avatar POV (Done)

Intro 4: Chilling with them, any POV. (Done)

Intro 5: Make your own scenario (Done)

This is arguably one of my biggest bots that I've done so far lmao.
